{{Quote|The Verti-Go also has an undocumented feature as a back-up weapon. In a pinch, many of the grappler heads, tipped with bards and hooks, make excellent projectile weapons. Course, you're such a smart merc you probably didn't need to be told that.|[[Sully Tigereye]]|<ref name="BFH" />}}
The '''Verti-Go Climbing System''' was a [[line thrower]]. It had a line of 150 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and came with an assortment of various climbing heads and a [[thincord]] spool climbing motor was attached to it. Its handle was foldable, making it easy to carry.

Verti-Gos were used by the [[Red Moons]], who also used them as deadly back-up weapons.
